category_sources: Official GitHub README describes MapSCII as a Braille and ASCII world map renderer for the console.
source_facts.description says MapSCII is the whole world in your console.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses MapSCII.
source_facts.homepage points to the official repository using the display name MapSCII.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for installation, local running, and keyboard controls.
source_facts.homepage points to the official repository.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository rastapasta/mapscii is the project source repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from source_facts.homepage.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes xterm-compatible Braille and ASCII rendering, vector tiles, and OpenStreetMap-based map data.
